data.content: Implemented a second-pass Conversation Log restyle to match the Take UI Terminal more closely: standardized the log and picker on IBM Plex Mono, the terminal surface palette (#1a1a2e / #16162a / #e0e0e0), larger log text, and stronger contrast on cards, headers, filters, and empty/loading states. Added a source contract test for the terminal theme. Validation in /Users/cartine/foolery-wt-foolery-c355-20260322: bun run lint (passes with existing warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Branch: work/foolery-c355-impl-20260322. Commit: 78be211ba550.
